'''The Everlasting''' is the second boss fought in the quest [[Dream Mentor]]. This monster has fairly high [[Defence]] against [[melee]] and [[Ranged]], but no [[Magic]] defence, so players should use Magic e.g. [[trident of the seas]] or [[Iban Blast]] in order to kill it effectively. It can be [[safespot]]ted using the lectern to the north. After this monster is killed, it transforms into its third form, [[The Untouchable]].

The Everlasting, along with its next form, cannot be walked through. Players should be warned that it is possible to get trapped by the edge of the arena next to the lectern, particularly when trying to set it up for safespotting. If this happens the player must either tank the damage it deals or escape using the lectern.

'''Note:''' Prayers '''cannot''' be utilised in this battle or any of the others before or after it. Should players die or choose to leave during the middle of the fight, they must start the '''entire''' battle over from The Inadequacy.

It can be fought in the [[Nightmare Zone]] after the quest is complete.
